# MENZERNA ONE STEP POLISH 3 IN 1 250ML

[Be the first to review this product](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html#review-form)

## CarCare24.eu - 22748281001, Menzerna 3 in 1 one-step is a polish, high-gloss finish and sealant in one product. It removes light imperfections to a glossy finish.

In stock
**SKU** 22748281001

Special Price €17.95 €14.83 Regular Price €19.95 

Qty 

Add to Cart 

Ordered before 16:00, then we ship the same day!

[

Add to Wish List
](#)

[

Add to Compare
](#)

[**Details**](#description)
**Why buy this product**
[One-step](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [polishing](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) process: [Polish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), [finish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), [sealant](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html).
[Grit 3000](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [abrasion](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html).
Fast deep [gloss](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [finish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html).
[Smoother](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) surface.
[Silicone](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html)-[free](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html).

**About this product**
[Menzerna](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [3 in 1](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html): [one-step](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [polish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), [high-gloss](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [finish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) and [wax](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) in a single product. [3 in 1](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) works like a medium sanding [polish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) and removes [3000](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [grit](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) and [finer](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [sanding](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) marks by machine. [3 in 1](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) reliably [removes](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [streaks](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) and [clouding](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html). It is applied as a [wax](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) with [rotative](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), [orbital](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [polishing](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [machines](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menu/polishers-supplies/polishers.html) or by hand. [Menzerna](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [One](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html)-[Step](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [Polish](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [3-in-1](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) saves you time because it [removes](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [light](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [imperfections](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) like [swirl](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [marks](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) and [water](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [spots](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), [polishes](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) to an extremely high [gloss](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) finish, and [waxes](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) for long lasing [protection](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) – all in one step! [Menzerna](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [3 in 1](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [Cut](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), [Gloss](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html), & [Wax](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) should be used with a dual action or rotary [polisher](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menu/polishers-supplies/polishers.html) for [maximum](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [cutting](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html) [action](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-one-step-polish-3-in-1-250ml.html).

**Specifications**




| SKU
| 22748281001



| Cut / Gloss
| 5-9



| Use with
| [rotary](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menu/polishers-supplies/polishers.html) [polisher](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menu/polishers-supplies/polishers.html), [orbital](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menu/polishers-supplies/polishers.html) [polisher](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menu/polishers-supplies/polishers.html)



| Used Pads
| Heavy Cut Foam Pad



| Content
| 250ml
